summary: P1.8-5 rules-only reasoning copy layer: buildWorkflowReasoning templates per validated workflow_id; ClarityCard expandable Why / Expected Impact / Next Steps; copy_source rules; reasoning_expanded analytics.

interfaceChanges.description: Deterministic Why / Impact / Next Steps keyed by workflow_id and health signals.

mappings.criterion: Template functions per workflow_id producing Why Impact Next Steps
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_operations_reasoning.test.ts::returns rules copy with why, expected impact, and next steps per workflow

mappings.criterion: Template entry for every validated workflow_id in catalog
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_operations_reasoning.test.ts::exposes a template entry for every validated workflow_id

mappings.criterion: Vietnamese copy with copy_source rules in pipeline chain
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_operations_reasoning.test.ts::produces Vietnamese copy with copy_source rules for pipeline output

mappings.criterion: Component test expand reasoning renders three sections
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_clarity_card_reasoning.test.tsx::expands reasoning to show Why, Expected Impact, and Next Steps sections

mappings.criterion: Reasoning expansion analytics event on expand
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_clarity_card_reasoning.test.tsx::emits reasoning_expanded analytics when personaId provided on expand
